source.name: RWAlpha Marketplace and Docs
source.note: Products are visible with Mantle selected in the RWAlpha marketplace. The documented contracts were observed on BNB Chain/BscScan, but Mantle contracts have not yet been verified.

products.name: RWAlpha rAIX Vault
products.mintRedeem: Daily subscribe/redeem; redemption settles up to T+5
products.riskNote: Returns and distributions are variable and not guaranteed. Marketplace visibility does not prove a verified Mantle token contract.

products.name: RWAlpha rAI Vault
products.riskNote: Returns and distributions are variable and not guaranteed. Marketplace visibility does not prove a verified Mantle token contract.

products.name: RWAlpha rSTR Vault
products.composition: STRC preferred shares and related underlying assets
products.riskNote: Returns and distributions are variable and not guaranteed. Marketplace visibility does not prove a verified Mantle token contract.
